# @platform/search-runtime

Search service abstraction: query interface, index management contracts, and search provider interface.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/search-runtime
Version: 0.1.0
Component: search-runtime
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: operations
Bounded context: search-service
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define the typed search query interface (full-text, filtered, faceted)
- Declare index management contracts (create, update, delete documents)
- Specify search provider interface that concrete adapters must implement
- Decouple feature packages from specific search engine SDKs

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement search index backends (owned by concrete adapters such as OpenSearch or Typesense)
- Does not define what data is indexed (owned by feature and domain packages)
- Does not own search ranking or relevance configuration

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by feature packages to execute search queries
- Imported by background workers to index or re-index documents
- Concrete adapters are registered at application startup via the provider interface

## Operational notes

- Index schemas are versioned ? breaking schema changes require a re-index migration
- Search is eventually consistent with the transactional store ? document freshness depends on indexing lag
